title: Bump Skopeo to v1.22.1, CVE-2026-34986, c/common v067.1, c/image v5.39.2
body:
This PR bumps:

Skopeo v1.22.1
c/common v0.67.1
c/image v0.1.79.3
grpc v1.79.3
gojose v4.14

This addresses CVE-2026-34986, and ensures CVE-2026-33186 is fixed.  The grpc issue does not seem to be present, but this update will squash it beyond any doubt.  

This will ready Skopeo to go out with Podman v5.8.2.

Fixes: https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-165041, https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-165013
